# Pyros Surfaces - Premium Indian Stone Exporter

> Pyros Surfaces is India's leading manufacturer and exporter of premium Gangsaw Calibrated (20mm & 30mm) Marble Slabs, Granite Slabs, Marble Tiles, and Granite Tiles.

## Core Capabilities
- Primary Export Products: Indian White Marble (Statuario, Carrara, Lilac), Granite (Absolute Black, Black Galaxy, Steel Grey, Tan Brown, Titanium Gold), Quartzite, Sandstone.
- Thickness Calibrations: 20mm & 30mm gangsaw calibrated slabs and precision cut-to-size tiles.
- Key Trade Corridor: Direct B2B Exporter from India to Saudi Arabia (Jeddah Islamic Port, Dammam Port, Yanbu Port), UAE, USA, UK, and 45+ countries.
- Certifications & Packaging: 100% SASO & SABER compliant export documentation with ISPM-15 fumigated wooden A-frame lashing.
- Factories & Quarries: Kishangarh, Rajsamand, Udaipur (Marble) & Khammam, Chimakurthy (Granite).

## Contact Information
- Website: https://www.pyrosstones.com/
- Email: info@pyrosstones.com
- Sales Hub: Udaipur & Kishangarh, Rajasthan, India
